symbols.name: ManagedNodeConfig

symbols.name: loadConfig
symbols.signature: async function loadConfig(configClient: NodeProtocolInterface, operatorPubKeyHex: string, nodeId: string, options?: ConfigLoaderOptions): Promise<LoadedConfig>

symbols.name: createConfigWatcher
symbols.description: Create a polling config watcher that detects config changes by comparing the record timestamp against the last known value.

symbols.name: buildClientsFromSpec

symbols.description: Build an array of clients from backend specifications.

symbols.name: loadSchemaModule
symbols.description: Dynamically import a schema module from a URL. Uses a cache-busting query parameter to ensure fresh imports.

symbols.name: createModuleWatcher
symbols.description: Create a watcher that detects schemaModuleUrl changes and hot-loads the new schema module.

symbols.name: createPeerClients
symbols.description: Split peers into push and pull HttpClient sets.

symbols.name: bestEffortClient
symbols.description: Wrap a client so receive() failures are non-fatal (best-effort push).

symbols.name: generateCompose
symbols.signature: function generateCompose(manifest: NetworkManifest, options: ComposeGeneratorOptions): string
symbols.description: Generate a docker-compose.yml from a NetworkManifest.

symbols.name: startLocalNetwork
symbols.signature: async function startLocalNetwork(manifest: NetworkManifest, options: LocalRunnerOptions): Promise<LocalNetwork>
symbols.description: Start a local network by spawning Deno processes for each node.
